chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI M.A No.79 of 2025 Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.4157/2025. 2. For orders on Office Objection & Reply at-A. 3. For orders on CMA No.4155/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For orders on CMA No.4159/2025. 03.06.2025 Mr. Shamail Sikandar, Advocate for the Applicant. ******* 1. Granted. 2-5. After arguing the matter at some length, leaned counsel states under instructions that he does not press the instant appeal since the appellant wishes to approach the appropriate forum for challenging the vires of the impugned notification dated 30th April, 2025. The appeal is accordingly dismissed as not pressed, alongwith listed application(s). JUDGE Hyder/PS*
